value_chain_position: High-power fiber and diode lasers — sells pump and direct-diode laser modules for industrial cutting/welding (commercial) and directed-energy weapon systems (defense).
relative_comps: LASR's 41% YoY revenue growth is driven by defense directed-energy contracts (Air Force/Navy laser weapon programs) plus industrial recovery. Its fiber-laser IP competes with IPG Photonics (the global leader) and II-VI/Coherent at the component level. In defense lasers it has fewer direct public-market comps; KTOS and DRS are adjacent. FCF margin of 8% is slim for the defense theme but the directed-energy pipeline creates a meaningful government-contract moat. Dual-use (industrial + defense) makes this a genuine two-theme name.
